items.title: Why Vertiv (VRT) Is Up 5.7% After Announcing a Strategic Data Center Power Alliance with Caterpillar
items.description: Vertiv and Caterpillar announced in November 2025 that they have entered into a strategic alliance to deliver integrated, modular energy optimization solutions for data centers, combining Vertiv’s power and cooling technologies with Caterpillar’s power generation and CCHP offerings. This collaboration aims to accelerate deployment, improve energy efficiency, and reduce grid dependence, responding directly to the rising global demand for reliable, on-site data center power and cooling. We’ll...

items.title: Vertiv Surges 57% in the Past 6 Months: Is the Stock Worth Buying?
items.description: VRT's six-month surge, booming AI-driven orders, and rapid portfolio expansion set the stage for a strong 2025 outlook.

items.title: Here's How Much $1000 Invested In Caterpillar 10 Years Ago Would Be Worth Today
Caterpillar Is Doubling Capacity: Here's What To Watch
items.description: Caterpillar is a top leader in data center power with strong air permits, according to BofA Securities analyst Michael Feniger, who reiterates a Buy rating and $650 price target.

items.title: CAT Stock Trades at Premium Value: Should You Buy, Hold or Sell?
items.description: Caterpillar' record Q3 revenues and rising backlog contrast with ongoing earnings pressure and steep valuation, keeping investors on alert.
